name: Annette Stevens
ai_summary: Annette Stevens from Goodyear, AZ has six years of childcare experience and seeks PT work. She highlights patience, creating safe environments, and building strong relationships with children.

transcripts.q3:
My name is Annette Stevens. I've been working in childcare for six years now. I worked as a paraprofessional as schools for six years. I've been working with kids of all, ages, all grades. I've worked at group home. Adolescence, I just really enjoy working with kids because I feel like they make the day go by faster. They make
 time go by faster and they give you the enjoyment of the day. Like they just put a smile on your face. I love building relationship with the kids, making them feel safe, making them understand, teaching them what they want to learn having fun with them. You know, the it's not about just working, it's about having fun with the kids, letting them feel safe with you teaching.
 Them and just be amazing with the kids. I want to make this a career. I've been doing this for so long. It grew apart of me, it's part of my lifestyle.
transcripts.q4: I am located in Goodyear Arizona. I do have a reliable transportation, so I'm willing to drive at least 20 miles out
transcripts.q5: I am looking for part-time work. I have open availability so I could pick up as much hours during the week but I'm just looking for part-time right now.
transcripts.q6: I will separate the two kids and to ask for help from a different staff so kind and get conversation out of both of the kids. See what happens and see what transpired Wilbur the triggers and see if it was anything else they could do to go about being cordial.
transcripts.q7: I make a great Uptown teacher because I'm patient attentive and genuinely care about children's growth and well-being. I create safe positive environment, where kids feel comfortable learning and expressing themselves. I'm also reliable and able to handle different situations. Call me making sure that each child gets to support that they need to succeed.
